emails.subject: Tax Re: i2 Technologies
emails.body: Tax Re: i2 Technologies Mark, It seems to me Erica's advice needs to apply not only to this NDA, but probably all of the NDA's that are going to originate from the Houston based EnronCredit.com business team. Further, it should apply not only to NDA's, but their whole business they are originating from Houston, yes? Maybe you need to talk to Erica... Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 10/26/2000 08:21 AM Michael Slade 10/26/2000 08:12 AM

emails.subject: Re: Tax Re: i2 Technologies
emails.body: Re: Tax Re: i2 Technologies Agreed can you please confirm directly with Erica that Tax has no problem with Enron Credit.com contracts being signed in the US. Tana Jones 10/26/2000 08:23 AM
